title: MITF Online Payment Ecosystem
content: MITF Online Payment Ecosystem Platform Vision The MITF Online Payment Ecosystem replaces scattered bank-credential integrations with a **unified layer**: API keys, a merchant control plane, and a dual-auth payment API. External channels (WooCommerce, direct API, POS) connect through defined APIs while **bank credentials stay in the portal vault**. The core payment engine—OTP flows and bank adapters—remains unchanged. **Goal:** Self-service onboarding, partner scale, and operational visibility wi

title: Integrations & WooCommerce
content: Integrations & WooCommerce Overview The integration framework connects external systems—stores, custom apps, POS—to MITF via **portal-issued API keys**, not bank credentials. Keys authenticate against V2; credentials resolve server-side from the portal vault. OTP-based payment security is preserved across all channels. --- Key Features * **API keys** — `mitf_live_*` / `mitf_test_*`; vault-backed credential resolution * **V2 REST API** — sessions, refunds, balance, transactions, reports * **Contr

title: Merchant Portal
content: Merchant Portal Overview The Merchant Portal is the **control plane** for the MITF Online Payment Ecosystem—a unified product combining a self-service web application (Angular) and backend API (.NET, FastEndpoints). Merchants onboard, manage payments, issue API keys, and connect integrations from one place. Bank credentials stay encrypted in the portal vault; integrators receive API keys only. --- Key Features * **Dashboard & onboarding** — KPIs, guided setup, quick-access to key modules * **Bil

title: Online Payment API V2
content: Online Payment API V2 Overview Online Payment API V2 is the **dual-auth payment platform** for MITF (.NET 10, FastEndpoints, PostgreSQL). One host serves legacy JWT clients (proxied verbatim to frozen V1) and new API-key integrators on RESTful `/v2/*`. V2 owns payment sessions, OTP, refunds, and inquiries; bank settlement goes through Legacy Core over gRPC. --- Key Features * **Dual auth** — JWT (V1 shape) and `x-api-key` (`mitf_live_*` / `mitf_test_*`) on one host * **Payment sessions** — open,
